summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of the new admin Leave Balance management feature on /leaves → 'All Employees' tab. All 12 specified test points pass end-to-end: RBAC toolbar, Edit modal with validation (reason required + used>total), successful save + table refresh, Audit Log modal showing manual/bulk_upload entries with before→after/reason/admin/timestamp, Initialize Missing (0 initialized / 38 skipped), and Download Template (.xlsx). Existing leave functionality unaffected.

issues: Uses native window.confirm() and window.alert() for initialize flow. Functional but inconsistent with the rest of the app which uses styled modals (e.g. Edit Balance, Audit Log). Low priority polish.

critical_code_review_comments: Leaves.js initializeBalances handler relies on window.confirm + window.alert — consider replacing with shadcn Dialog/AlertDialog for consistent UX (not blocking).
Edit Balance modal: Inline validation for used>total fires on Save, not on blur/change — acceptable but on-input feedback would be a nicer UX.

Audit log shows both 'manual' and 'bulk_upload' source badges correctly — verified via RMF0001 (manual) and RMF0002 (bulk_upload) entries with before→after snapshots, reason, changed_by=admin, and timestamps.
Edit button styling uses bg-[#E85B1E]/10 text-[#E85B1E] (orange tint) as specified — visually distinct from the neutral View button. Good.
seed_data_creation: Modified RMF0001 leave balance to CL=10/2, SL=15/0, EL=3/1, Marriage=5/0 with reason 'Test adjustment from UI'. One audit entry created. RMF0001 now shows CL 8/10 (remaining/total) in the All Employees table.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New admin leave-balance endpoints are live and UI-wired. Edit buttons use data-testid='edit-balance-{EMP_ID}'. Toolbar testids: init-balances-btn, download-template-btn, bulk-upload-btn, audit-log-btn. Native confirm/alert is used for Initialize flow — Playwright handlers should register a page.on('dialog', ...) listener to accept both the confirm and the alert. Bulk-upload flow (excel parse) was not tested from UI in this run (no malformed file prepared); backend self-test already covered blank-reason and unknown-ID detection per agent-to-agent note.
verified_test_points: Navigate to /leaves → tab-all visible and clickable
4 admin toolbar buttons all rendered and visible: init-balances-btn, download-template-btn, bulk-upload-btn, audit-log-btn
38 edit-balance-{EMP_ID} buttons present (one per row), orange tint class bg-[#E85B1E]/10 text-[#E85B1E] applied
Edit modal opens titled 'Edit Leave Balance — RMF0001' with 4 leave-type rows (CL/SL/EL/Marriage), Total/Used inputs, Remaining auto-computed
Save without reason → inline error 'Reason is required.' shown, no API call fired
Used(10) > Total(5) → inline error 'CL: used (10) cannot exceed total (5).' shown, save blocked
Valid save (CL 10/2, SL 15/0, EL 3/1, Marriage 5/0 + reason) → modal closes, RMF0001 row refreshes to '8 / 10' for CL and '2 / 3' for EL
Audit Log modal opens and shows the just-made manual edit for RMF0001 with before→after values (CL 8/0 → 10/2 etc.), reason 'Test adjustment from UI', by admin, timestamp, badge='manual'
Audit Log also shows prior bulk_upload entries with badge='bulk_upload'

Initialize Missing → native confirm 'Initialize leave balances for all active employees...' → accept → POST /api/leaves/admin/initialize-balances returns 200 → alert 'Initialized: 0, Skipped (already had balance): 38'
Download Template → triggers download of file 'Leave_Balances_FY.xlsx'
Existing functionality: My Leaves tab, Pending Approvals tab, Apply Leave button all still render/clickable
